yaml
project:
  type: website
  output-dir: docs

website:
  title: "My Website"
  navbar:
    logo: ""   # optional – you can add a logo path
    left:
      - href: index.qmd
        text: Inicio
      - href: about.qmd
        text: Ceremonias
      - href: blog.qmd
        text: Materiales
      - href: blog.qmd
        text: Cacao
  page-footer:
    center: "© 2026 Olivia Almanza and Salvador Ruiz"

format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo          # Disable built‑in themes
    css: styles.css      # Our custom stylesheet
    toc: true
